readings.Aries: You are not too much. You are, however, misdirected. Adjust the trajectory. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Taurus: Your instinct to stay is correct. The reason you're staying is worth examining. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Gemini: There is a project that needs your whole brain, not the spare capacity you've been giving it. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Cancer: Your intuition about what someone else is feeling is usually right. Your interpretation of why may not be. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Leo: Your instinct for the dramatic is usually right. In this case it's obscuring what's actually simple. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Virgo: You have more compassion for imperfection than your reputation suggests. Show it. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Libra: There is beauty in the asymmetry you've been trying to correct. Let it be. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Scorpio: What you call jealousy is a diagnostic tool for what you care about most. Use it accordingly. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Sagittarius: The map is useful. The territory is better. Go off-map today. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Capricorn: The thing you're working toward is real. The price you're paying for it deserves examination. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Aquarius: You've been consistent about one thing that no one has noticed. You can keep going without the notice. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Pisces: There is something you've been trying to hold together that wants to fall apart constructively. Let it. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
